data.body: A3 LIVE remediation complete on shared store. Before: 2422 SNAPSHOT_INCONSISTENT + 13 ORPHAN_EVENT + 1 MISSING_CREATE. After: 0 SI + 13 ORPHAN + 1 MISSING_CREATE (pushed to origin/tickets @ 47d917f6). Found+fixed a tooling gap: _repair_plan excluded folded OLDER snapshots from retire (4 cases); extended it (never retires the horizon snapshot). Empirically PROVED the 13 EDIT orphans + 1 MISSING_CREATE must stay human-triage: --repair-snapshots rebuild reverted 11 tickets closed->in_progress (order-sensitive STATUS reorder) — reverted before push, no data pushed. Reconciler schedule was disabled during the window, now re-enabled.
